title: How to Write an Invoice: The Ultimate Guide for Freelancers
excerpt: Learn the essential components of a professional invoice and how to ensure you get paid on time, every time.
author: InvoiceOS Team
content: Writing an invoice might seem simple, but missing key details can lead to payment delays. In this guide, we cover everything from tax IDs to payment terms...

title: Proforma Invoice vs. Standard Invoice: What's the Difference?
excerpt: Not sure which document to send? We break down the differences between proforma and standard invoices.
author: InvoiceOS Team
content: A proforma invoice is a preliminary bill of sale sent to buyers in advance of a shipment or delivery of goods...
